items.claim: Dioni Barbosa will submit her opponent in this fight.
items.quote: I think Barbosa is going to immediately submit her in this fight.

items.claim: Jose Delgado has a five-inch reach advantage over Austin Bashi.
items.quote: Delgato again, five inches of reach on Bashie.

items.claim: Austin Bashi will struggle to get into range against Jose Delgado due to the reach discrepancy.
items.quote: I do believe Austin Bashie is really going to struggle in terms of getting into range against Delgato.

items.claim: Jose Delgado's striking power is a significant threat.
items.quote: Delgato throws very hard and Delgado hits hard too.

items.claim: Jose Delgado shows improved performance and conditioning as a fight progresses into the later rounds.
items.quote: as that fight goes on, Delgato just gets better.

items.claim: Austin Bashi's primary path to victory is securing takedowns.
items.quote: I really only think that's Bashie's that's Bashie's only pathway to victory in this fight is by taking down Delgado.

items.claim: Alberto Montes is highly skilled and dangerous on the ground, specifically with the anaconda choke.
items.quote: he's quite good on the ground and he's tricky on the ground, right? Alberto Montes is able to take you down. He's got so many different submissions.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan's best path to victory against Alberto Montes is on the feet.
items.quote: his best pathway has to be on the feet in this fight.
